languages.text: {n}Несколько разгневанных бинарных трелей предваряют ответ Паскаля.{/n} "Директива принята, Лорд-капитан".
{n}Several indignant bursts of binharic chatter precede Pasqal's response.{/n} "Directive acknowledged, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}Несколько разгневанных бинарных трелей предваряют ответ Паскаля.{/n} "Директива принята, Лорд-капитан".

languages.text: {n}Pasqals Antwort gehen einige entrüstete binhärische Tiraden voraus.{/n} "Direktive bestätigt, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}Several indignant bursts of binharic chatter precede Pasqal's response.{/n} "Directive acknowledged, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqals Antwort gehen einige entrüstete binhärische Tiraden voraus.{/n} "Direktive bestätigt, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}La réponse de Pasqal est précédée de plusieurs trilles binhaires indignés.{/n} « Directive bien reçue, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Several indignant bursts of binharic chatter precede Pasqal's response.{/n} "Directive acknowledged, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}La réponse de Pasqal est précédée de plusieurs trilles binhaires indignés.{/n} « Directive bien reçue, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: {n}帕斯卡先是发出一阵愤慨的二进制杂音，随后答道：{/n}“指令已收到，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}Several indignant bursts of binharic chatter precede Pasqal's response.{/n} "Directive acknowledged, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}帕斯卡先是发出一阵愤慨的二进制杂音，随后答道：{/n}“指令已收到，舰长大人。”

languages.text: {n}Un estallido de binario indignado precede a la respuesta de Pasqal.{/n} «Directiva recibida, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: {n}Several indignant bursts of binharic chatter precede Pasqal's response.{/n} "Directive acknowledged, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un estallido de binario indignado precede a la respuesta de Pasqal.{/n} «Directiva recibida, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: {n}パスカルの返答の前に、憤慨したビンハリ語のおしゃべりが何度か聞こえた。{/n}"指令、承りました、船長"
languages.original_text: {n}Several indignant bursts of binharic chatter precede Pasqal's response.{/n} "Directive accepted, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}Birkaç öfkeli ikilidil ifadenin ardından Pasqal yanıtını veriyor.{/n} "Yönerge kabul edilmiştir Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: {n}Several indignant bursts of binharic chatter precede Pasqal's response.{/n} "Directive acknowledged, Lord Captain."
